mapper.select:
SELECT ISNULL(A.ORDER_NO, '') orderNo, ISNULL(A.CUSTOMER_CODE, '') customerCode, ISNULL(A1.CUSTOMER_NAME, '') customerName, X.ITEM_CODE itemCode, X1.MATERIAL_NAME itemName, X1.MATERIAL_SPEC itemSpec, ISNULL(A.ORDER_QTY, 0) orderQty, --수주량 X.WORK_CODE workCode, X3.WORK_NAME workName, X.PROD_CODE prodItemCode, X2.MATERIAL_NAME prodItemName, X2.MATERIAL_SPEC prodItemSpec, X.WORKDT_DATE workDtDate, X.PROD_QTY workQty, --작업지시량 ISNULL(S.PRODQTY,0) prodQty, ISNULL(S.GOODQTY,0) goodQty, ISNULL(S.BADQTY,0) badQty, X.PROD_QTY-ISNULL(S.PRODQTY,0) remainQty, CASE WHEN X.PROD_QTY = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ISNULL(S.PRODQTY,0) * 100.0 / X.PROD_QTY END rate, X.FACTORY_CODE, X.PRODPLAN_DATE, X.PRODPLAN_SEQ, X.PRODWORK_SEQ, X.WORK_SEQ, X.TPR504ID tpr504Id FROM TPR504 X
LEFT JOIN TPR301R A ON X.FACTORY_CODE = A.FACTORY_CODE AND X.PRODPLAN_DATE = A.PRODPLAN_DATE AND X.PRODPLAN_SEQ = A.PRODPLAN_SEQ LEFT JOIN TCO601 A1 ON A.FACTORY_CODE = A1.FACTORY_CODE AND A.CUSTOMER_CODE = A1.CUSTOMER_CODE
LEFT JOIN TCO403 X1 ON X.ITEM_CODE = X1.MATERIAL_ID
LEFT JOIN TCO403 X2 ON X.PROD_CODE = X2.MATERIAL_ID
LEFT JOIN TPR102 X3 --공정 ON X.FACTORY_CODE = X3.FACTORY_CODE AND X.WORK_CODE = X3.WORK_CODE
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FACTORY_CODE, PRODPLAN_DATE, PRODPLAN_SEQ, WORK_SEQ, SUM(PROD_QTY) PRODQTY, SUM(GOOD_QTY) GOODQTY, SUM(BAD_QTY) BADQTY FROM TPR601 GROUP BY FACTORY_CODE, PRODPLAN_DATE, PRODPLAN_SEQ, WORK_SEQ ) S ON X.FACTORY_CODE = S.FACTORY_CODE AND X.PRODPLAN_DATE = S.PRODPLAN_DATE AND X.PRODPLAN_SEQ = S.PRODPLAN_SEQ AND X.WORK_SEQ = S.WORK_SEQ
WHERE ISNULL(x.DELETE_FLAG,'') != '1' ORDER BY X.PRODPLAN_DATE, CAST(X.PRODPLAN_SEQ AS INT), CAST(X.WORK_SEQ AS INT)
SELECT count(*) FROM TPR504 X WHERE ISNULL(x.DELETE_FLAG,'') != '1'
